goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 09:15' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
The train should go to 'stansted airport' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'east' and should be in the type of 'theatre'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of park'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 09:15 and should leave on tuesday
The train should go to stansted airport and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get travel time and price
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the east and should be in the type of theatre
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of park
Make sure you get entrance fee
